mapper.insert: INSERT INTO record.trip_record_entries ( id, trip_id, itinerary_day_id, itinerary_item_id, uploaded_by_user_id, title, caption, location_name, lat, lng, taken_at, visibility, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{entry.id}, #{entry.tripId}, #{entry.itineraryDayId}, #{entry.itineraryItemId}, #{entry.uploadedByUserId}, #{entry.title}, #{entry.caption}, #{entry.locationName}, #{entry.lat}, #{entry.lng}, #{entry.takenAt}, 'TRIP_MEMBERS', 'ACTIVE', #{entry.createdAt}, #{entry.updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE record.trip_record_entries SET itinerary_day_id = #{entry.itineraryDayId}, itinerary_item_id = #{entry.itineraryItemId}, title = #{entry.title}, caption = #{entry.caption}, location_name = #{entry.locationName}, lat = #{entry.lat}, lng = #{entry.lng}, taken_at = #{entry.takenAt}, updated_at = #{entry.updatedAt} WHERE trip_id = #{entry.tripId} AND id = #{entry.recordId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO record.trip_record_media ( record_entry_id, media_file_id, sort_order, created_at ) VALUES ( #{recordId}, #{mediaFileId}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt} )
